fields.In-Network Tier 4 RX: 30% coinsurance up to $250 / 40% coinsurance up to $250
fields.Deductible Explanation: Family deductible and out-of-pocket limit are embedded, meaning the cost shares of one family member will be applied to the per member deductible and per member out-of-pocket limit; in addition, amounts for all covered family members apply to both the family deductible and family out-of-pocket limit. No one member will pay more than the per member deductible or per member out-of-pocket limit.
fields.In-Network RX: Tier 1 - Typically Generic: $10 / $20 / Tier 2 - Typically Preferred Brand: $50 / $60 / Tier 3 - Typically Non-Preferred Brand: $90 / $100 / Tier 4 - Typically Specialty (brand and generic): 30% coinsurance up to $250 / 40% coinsurance up to $250
fields.Preferred Network RX: Tier 1 - Typically Generic: $10 / Tier 2 - Typically Preferred Brand: $50 / Tier 3 - Typically Non-Preferred Brand: $90 / Tier 4 - Typically Specialty (brand and generic): 30% coinsurance up to $250
